title: Introducing Yourself
description: Learn to say who you are, where you are from, and what you do. First conversations in English.

title: Daily Routine
description: Talk about everyday activities: waking up, eating, working, and sleeping.

title: Food and Drinks
description: Order food, describe what you like, and ask for things at a restaurant or café.

title: Places in the City
description: Ask for and give directions. Identify and name common urban locations.

title: Time and Dates
description: Tell the time, say the date, and talk about days of the week and months of the year.

title: Pronunciation
description: Sons do inglês que não existem no português. TH, vogais longas e curtas, ritmo da frase.

title: Family and Relationships
description: Descreva sua família, aparência física e personalidade. Compare pessoas e coisas.

title: Shopping and Money
description: Vocabulário de compras, preços e dinheiro. Comparativos, superlativos, too/enough.

title: Travel and Transport
description: Meios de transporte, aeroporto, hotel. Passado simples completo. Futuro com Will.

title: Health and the Body
description: Partes do corpo, sintomas e consulta médica. Must / Have To para obrigação.

title: Work and Technology
description: Presente contínuo, escritório, tecnologia. Contraste Simple vs Continuous.

title: Hobbies and Free Time
description: Hobbies, frequência, gerúndio. Sugestões, convites e narração de passado.

title: Pronunciation A2
description: Entonação de perguntas, redução de vogais, ligação entre palavras e ritmo natural.

title: Experiences and the Past
description: O Present Perfect para falar de experiências de vida. Contraste com o Past Simple.

title: Stories and Memories
description: Narração rica com Past Continuous e Past Simple. Como contar histórias em inglês.

title: Plans and Possibilities
description: Arranjos futuros, First Conditional e modais de possibilidade: might, may, could.

title: The World Around Us
description: Voz passiva e orações relativas. Vocabulário de sociedade, cultura e processos.

title: How to Express Yourself
description: Gerúndio vs infinitivo, discurso indireto e conectivos B1 para opinião e argumento.

title: B1 Real Life
description: Entrevista de emprego, viagem internacional, negociação e narração pessoal completa.

title: Pronunciation B1
description: Stress de palavra, stress de frase, assimilação e elisão na fala conectada natural.

title: Perfect Tenses
description: Present Perfect Continuous, Past Perfect e Past Perfect Continuous. Os tempos que conectam momentos no tempo com precisão.

title: Hypothetical World
description: Second e Third Conditional, Mixed Conditionals, wishes e regrets. Como falar do que poderia ter sido.

title: Reporting and Voice
description: Reported Speech completo, Passive Voice em todos os tempos e reporting verbs para discurso acadêmico e profissional.

title: Future and Speculation
description: Future Perfect, Future Continuous e modais avançados para especulação e expressão de certeza graduada.

title: Argument and Discourse
description: Discourse markers B2, argumentação estruturada, relative clauses avançadas e escrita de ensaio acadêmico.

title: B2 Real World
description: Vocabulário e estruturas B2 aplicados: sociedade, economia, meio ambiente, tecnologia, debate e apresentação.

title: Pronunciation B2
description: Padrões de entonação natural, stress em palavras complexas, sufixos e compostos. A prosódia do falante independente avançado.

title: Advanced Grammar I
description: Inversion, cleft sentences, participle clauses and nominalisation — the structural hallmarks of sophisticated English.

title: Advanced Grammar II
description: Advanced passive, ellipsis, substitution, complex verb patterns and register precision.

title: Conditionals and Modals C1
description: Mixed conditionals with cross-time reference, the full retrospective modal system, hedging and epistemic stance.

title: Discourse and Argument C1
description: Advanced discourse markers, C1 reported speech, academic essay structure and critical reading skills.

title: Language in Use C1
description: C1 collocations, vocabulary precision, nominalisation in context and C1 speaking strategies.

title: C1 Real World
description: Academic seminars, professional documents, cultural commentary and full-synthesis debate at C1 level.

title: Pronunciation C1
description: Mastery of weak forms and connected speech; prosody, rhythm and social meaning of intonation.

title: Rhetoric and Style C2
description: Fronting, rhetorical parallelism, discourse grammar and the architecture of stylistically controlled prose. At C2, structure is a rhetorical instrument.

title: Pragmatics and Implicature C2
description: What is meant vs what is said. Irony, understatement, politeness strategies and register shifting — the pragmatic dimension of full mastery.

title: Lexical Mastery C2
description: Collocations at scale, idiomatic competence with restraint, emotional precision and abstract philosophical vocabulary. Lexical depth, not lexical breadth.

title: Advanced Writing C2
description: Academic density with critical voice, argument at C2 precision, synthesis of complex information and revision as craft.

title: Speaking and Listening C2
description: Extended argument under pressure, listening to dense authentic input, debate with tonal control and real-time reformulation.

title: C2 Real World
description: Academic discourse, high-stakes professional communication, literary reading and the final synthesis: the language as instrument, medium and system.

title: Pronunciation C2
description: Prosodic strategy as meaning-making: contrastive stress, discourse intonation for irony, concession, suspense and rhetorical framing.

title: The World Around You
description: Vocabulário essencial do mundo ao redor: tempo climático, estações do ano, roupas e cores, animais e pets.

title: Alphabet, Spelling and Questions
description: O alfabeto inglês completo, como soletrar em situações reais, números ordinais com datas e as sete perguntas fundamentais.

title: Language Tools A2
description: Used to para hábitos passados, reported speech básico, ordem de adjetivos com both/neither/either e comunicação por telefone e e-mail.

title: Life and Society A2
description: Escola e educação, transporte e viagens, férias e tempo livre, números grandes e vocabulário de dinheiro.

title: Grammar in Use A2
description: Second Conditional para situações hipotéticas, connectors discursivos (although/however/despite), preposições compostas e avançadas, e question tags.

title: Home, Food and Opinions
description: Casa e moradia (rent/flatmate/landlord), vocabulário de culinária (bake/fry/recipe), dar e pedir opiniões com educação, e inglês social para convites e small talk.

title: Grammar Depth B1
description: Third Conditional, Mixed Conditionals, Wish e If Only, Present Perfect Continuous, adjetivos compostos e expressões de medida.

title: Practical English B1
description: Escrita formal (e-mail e carta), conselhos com ought to e had better, vocabulário de saúde e estilo de vida, e habilidades de discussão e debate.

title: Advanced Grammar B2
description: Inversão formal, participle clauses, nominalização, ellipsis, perguntas embutidas e subjuntivo mandativo com phrasal verbs B2 avançados.

title: Style and Register B2
description: Registo formal vs informal, vocabulário de precisão, graus de certeza e probabilidade, colocações avançadas, e leitura e escuta crítica.

title: Advanced Lexis C1
description: Idioms C1, three-part phrasal verbs, advanced collocations (exert/wield/bear the brunt/garner/brook), and advanced article uses including the + adjective as noun class.

title: Expression and Fluency C1
description: Formal subjunctive in fixed expressions (as it were/be that as it may/lest), spoken fluency strategies and turn management, complex word formation and derivational chains, rhetorical devices for persuasion.

title: Language as System C2
description: Absolute constructions and literary/archaic register (albeit/hitherto/whereupon/notwithstanding); deixis and deictic shift; lexical density, register blending and code-switching; conceptual metaphor and extended metaphor.

title: Language, Power and Genre C2
description: Critical Discourse Analysis — euphemism, doublespeak and the language of power; etymology and productive root knowledge; text genre conventions (obituary/manifesto/op-ed/executive brief); rare and precise vocabulary (tendentious/specious/apposite/expedient), style mimicry and the limits of C2.
